description: Recorded review-course lecture. Flexor tendon zones, repair timelines, and early active motion protocols. Practice-quiz misses cluster here around zone II timelines.
name: CHT Review - Flexor Tendon Rehabilitation

description: Recorded review-course lecture. Carpal tunnel, cubital tunnel, and nerve compression testing. Provocative tests and conservative-versus-post-op management.
name: CHT Review - Nerve Compression Syndromes

description: Recorded review-course lecture. Distal radius and scaphoid fracture protocols, immobilization timelines, and return-to-motion criteria. A weak spot in the weekly quizzes.
name: CHT Review - Wrist Fracture Protocols

description: Recorded review-course lecture. Thumb CMC osteoarthritis, joint protection, orthotic fabrication, and strengthening progressions.
name: CHT Review - Thumb CMC Arthritis

description: Recorded review-course lecture. Sensory reeducation, desensitization, and edema management after nerve injury and replantation.
name: CHT Review - Sensory Reeducation and Edema Management
